article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his profile.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent artists. His work is characterized by a distinctive blend of electronic and dancehall elements.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry.
He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.
His production style is characterized by a distinctive blend of electronic and dancehall elements, reflecting his background in the Mexican music scene.
Noizekid is associated with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
